case_title: CLARK, VIRGANEYCE VS BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO DAVID PILEING-OFFICE MGR BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARK, VIRGANEYCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY STEAMBOAT POINT APARTMENTS $189.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $210.00, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST DEFT STEAMBOAT POINT APARTMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CLARK, VIRGANEYCE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY STEAMBOAT POINT APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1996 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
